# kDADiskDescriptionWatchVolumeName | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Disk Arbitration ](/documentation/diskarbitration)

- [ kDADiskDescriptionWatchVolumeName ](/documentation/diskarbitration/kdadiskdescriptionwatchvolumename)

-  kDADiskDescriptionWatchVolumeName 

Global Variable# kDADiskDescriptionWatchVolumeName

Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.4+

```
var kDADiskDescriptionWatchVolumeName: Unmanaged<CFArray>
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/diskarbitration/kdadiskdescriptionwatchvolumename#Discussion)

Predefined CFArray object containing a set of disk description keys appropriate for watching volume name changes using DARegisterDiskDescriptionChangedCallback().
